B-TRAVEL-0001.prompt:
Subject (피사체): Bali Ubud rice terrace viewed from infinity pool edge at dawn.
Context (촬영 맥락): Luxury hospitality / travel editorial photography, commissioned for premium hotel or OTA campaign. Medium-format digital, 35mm or 50mm lens, f/5.6, ISO 200, shot handheld with subtle natural micro-motion.
Composition (구도): top-down flat-lay of travel essentials — passport, camera, linen, coffee — subtle brand-ready negative space. Leading lines emphasize place, human presence is implied not explicit. upper 30% sky/wall negative space reserved for headline.
Lighting (라이팅): midday clear sky with strong directional sun, controlled specular highlights.
Color palette (팔레트): terracotta, olive, sun-bleached oak, dusty blue.
Atmosphere (분위기): active weekend with close friends, lively yet tasteful. Sensory details — air temperature, scent, texture of wood/stone/linen implied.
Post (후보정): natural film-like contrast, restrained shadow lift, Kodak Portra 400 emulation, no Instagram filters, no artificial bloom.
Negative (금지): no text, no logos, no watermarks, no crowds of people, no duplicated windows, no fake-looking CGI surfaces, no over-HDR, no neon oversaturation.
B-TRAVEL-0001.revised: Luxury travel editorial photo, medium-format digital look (35mm or 50mm lens feel), f/5.6 ISO200 handheld subtle natural micro-motion. Scene: Bali Ubud rice terraces viewed beyond the edge of an infinity pool at dawn, but lighting is midday clear sky with strong directional sun and controlled specular highlights; reconcile by showing warm early-day ambiance with crisp sunbeams and clear sky. Composition: top-down flat-lay from the pool edge looking down toward the terraces; travel essentials arranged on sun-bleached oak pool deck/stone: passport (no readable text), compact camera, folded linen, ceramic cup of coffee with subtle steam, sunglasses; wet stone and water edge creating leading lines toward the rice terraces. Upper 30% reserved negative space of clean sky/wall for headline, no text. Color palette: terracotta, olive, sun-bleached oak, dusty blue accents (linen or pool tile). Atmosphere: lively weekend with close friends implied by casual placement (two coffee cups, extra towel) but no people visible. Post: natural film-like contrast, restrained shadow lift, Kodak Portra 400 emulation, subtle grain, no bloom. Avoid: logos, watermarks, crowds, duplicated windows, fake CGI, over-HDR, neon oversaturation.
